notes: FAQ v1 — initial snapshot. Will be updated when main is completed.

entries.a: Study Room Booking System — a CA2 project to manage study room bookings on campus.

entries.q: What technologies does the main project use?
entries.a: Backend: Node.js + Express; Frontend: EJS templates; Database: MySQL.

entries.q: What is the purpose of this personal agent?
entries.a: A standalone, read-only web agent that serves FAQ info and helps you inspect project docs without modifying main.

entries.q: Will this agent modify the main database or perform team functions?
entries.a: No. It is read-only and will not perform login, registration, room creation, booking edits, deletions, or searches.

entries.q: How do I update the FAQ when main is complete?
entries.a: Edit `25039467/faq.json` with new entries or ask the assistant to re-scan the repo and populate a new FAQ version.
